orchestration-task-planning.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
orchestration-task-planning.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK 中 planner = Agent(name="Planner", instructions="Decompose the release goal into ordered steps", tools=[create_step])；await Runner.run(planner, input="Ship v2.4 hotfix by Friday") 在 RunResult.new_items 产出逐步 Task 规划。
orchestration-task-planning.en: OpenAI Agents SDK planner = Agent(name="Planner", instructions="Decompose the release goal into ordered steps", tools=[create_step]); await Runner.run(planner, input="Ship v2.4 hotfix by Friday") emits step-wise planning in RunResult.new_items.
orchestration-task-planning.ja: OpenAI Agents SDK planner Agent と Runner.run が段階的 Task 計画を new_items に出力。

orchestration-task-planning.name: LangGraph StateGraph
orchestration-task-planning.zh: LangGraph builder = StateGraph(PlanState)；builder.add_node("draft_plan", draft_plan_fn)；builder.add_edge(START, "draft_plan")；graph = builder.compile()；graph.invoke({"goal": "reduce churn"}) 将节点序列映射为 TaskPlan。
orchestration-task-planning.en: LangGraph StateGraph builder.add_node("draft_plan", draft_plan_fn) and graph.invoke({"goal": "reduce churn"}) maps node sequence to TaskPlan.
orchestration-task-planning.ja: LangGraph StateGraph add_node/invoke が TaskPlan に写像。

orchestration-task-planning.name: CrewAI Task
orchestration-task-planning.zh: CrewAI research_task = Task(description="Survey top 5 churn drivers in Q2 cohort", expected_output="Markdown table with metrics", agent=researcher)；crew.kickoff(inputs={"segment": "enterprise"}) 绑定 WorkSpecification。
orchestration-task-planning.en: CrewAI Task(description="Survey top 5 churn drivers", expected_output="Markdown table", agent=researcher) with crew.kickoff binds WorkSpecification.
orchestration-task-planning.ja: CrewAI Task(description, expected_output, agent) と kickoff が WorkSpecification を束縛。

orchestration-task-planning.name: AutoGen GroupChat
orchestration-task-planning.zh: AutoGen GroupChat(agents=[planner, critic], messages=[], max_round=6) 与 GroupChatManager(groupchat=groupchat, llm_config=gpt4) 通过 select_speaker 轮流完善 Task 分解。
orchestration-task-planning.en: AutoGen GroupChat with GroupChatManager select_speaker iteratively refines Task decomposition across planner and critic agents.
orchestration-task-planning.ja: AutoGen GroupChatManager select_speaker が Task 分解を反復改善。

orchestration-task-planning.name: Anthropic extended thinking
orchestration-task-planning.zh: Anthropic messages.create(model="claude-sonnet-4-20250514", thinking={"type":"enabled","budget_tokens":10000}, messages=[{"role":"user","content":"Plan incident response"}]) 的内部 reasoning 块映射规划中间态。
orchestration-task-planning.en: Anthropic messages.create with thinking budget maps internal reasoning blocks to planning intermediate state.
orchestration-task-planning.ja: Anthropic thinking budget 付き messages.create が planning 中間状態に写像。

orchestration-routing-control.name: LangGraph
orchestration-routing-control.zh: LangGraph add_conditional_edges("router", route_fn, {"billing":"billing_node","tech":"tech_node"}) 中 route_fn(state) 读取 state["intent"] 返回分支键。
orchestration-routing-control.en: LangGraph add_conditional_edges("router", route_fn, map) where route_fn(state) reads state["intent"] and returns branch key.
orchestration-routing-control.ja: LangGraph add_conditional_edges と route_fn(state) が intent 分岐。

orchestration-routing-control.name: Semantic Router
orchestration-routing-control.zh: SemanticRouter(routes=[Route(name="billing", utterances=["refund","invoice"])]) 对 "Where is my invoice?" 调用 router(text) 返回 name="billing", score=0.89。
orchestration-routing-control.en: SemanticRouter Route(name="billing") returns name="billing", score=0.89 for "Where is my invoice?".
orchestration-routing-control.ja: SemanticRouter router(text) が billing route を score=0.89 で選択。

orchestration-routing-control.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
orchestration-routing-control.zh: triage_agent = Agent(handoffs=[billing_agent, technical_agent])；Runner.run(triage_agent, "Need refund") 产生 HandoffCallItem 路由到 billing_agent。
orchestration-routing-control.en: OpenAI triage_agent handoffs produce HandoffCallItem routing to billing_agent on refund intent.
orchestration-routing-control.ja: OpenAI handoffs が HandoffCallItem で billing_agent へルーティング。

orchestration-routing-control.name: AutoGen GroupChat
orchestration-routing-control.zh: GroupChatManager(groupchat=groupchat, speaker_selection_method="round_robin") 按 round_robin 选择下一发言 agent 作为路由目标。
orchestration-routing-control.en: AutoGen GroupChatManager speaker_selection_method="round_robin" selects next agent as routing target.
orchestration-routing-control.ja: AutoGen round_robin speaker selection が routing target を決定。

orchestration-routing-control.name: OPA
orchestration-routing-control.zh: opa eval -d bundle/data/support/allow.rego -i ticket.json "data.support.allow" 对 input.ticket.risk=="high" 返回 false，LangGraph gate 节点据此阻断下游 dispatch。
orchestration-routing-control.en: opa eval data.support.allow returns false for high-risk ticket, blocking LangGraph downstream dispatch at gate node.
orchestration-routing-control.ja: OPA allow.rego eval が high-risk ticket で false を返し gate が dispatch を阻止。

orchestration-delegation-handoff.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
orchestration-delegation-handoff.zh: handoff(refund_agent, tool_name_override="transfer_to_refunds") 与 Runner.run(triage_agent, "Cancel subscription") 在 HandoffOutputItem 记录 source_agent=triage, target_agent=refund_agent。
orchestration-delegation-handoff.en: handoff(refund_agent) with Runner.run records HandoffOutputItem source=triage, target=refund_agent.
orchestration-delegation-handoff.ja: OpenAI handoff + Runner.run が HandoffOutputItem を記録。

orchestration-delegation-handoff.name: CrewAI
orchestration-delegation-handoff.zh: manager = Agent(role="Manager", allow_delegation=True, tools=[DelegateWorkTool()])；manager 将子任务委派给 researcher.execute_task(task=research_task)。
orchestration-delegation-handoff.en: CrewAI Agent allow_delegation=True delegates subtasks via DelegateWorkTool to researcher.execute_task.
orchestration-delegation-handoff.ja: CrewAI allow_delegation=True が DelegateWorkTool で子 Task を委任。

orchestration-delegation-handoff.name: A2A Protocol
orchestration-delegation-handoff.zh: JSON-RPC tasks/send {"message":{"role":"ROLE_USER","parts":[{"text":"Summarize Q2 revenue"}]},"configuration":{"blocking":false}} 创建远程 Task id=task-remote-884，status.state=TASK_STATE_WORKING。
orchestration-delegation-handoff.en: A2A tasks/send creates remote Task id=task-remote-884 with TASK_STATE_WORKING for delegated work.
orchestration-delegation-handoff.ja: A2A tasks/send が TASK_STATE_WORKING の remote Task を作成。

orchestration-delegation-handoff.name: AutoGen GroupChat
orchestration-delegation-handoff.zh: groupchat.select_speaker(last_speaker=planner, selector=custom_next_speaker) 返回 analyst 作为下一委派接收方。
orchestration-delegation-handoff.en: AutoGen groupchat.select_speaker returns analyst as next delegation recipient.
orchestration-delegation-handoff.ja: AutoGen select_speaker が analyst を次の委任先に選択。

orchestration-delegation-handoff.name: LangGraph subgraph
orchestration-delegation-handoff.zh: supervisor 返回 Command(goto="research_worker", update={"delegated_query": state["query"]}) 启动子图 worker 节点执行委派。
orchestration-delegation-handoff.en: LangGraph supervisor Command(goto="research_worker", update={"delegated_query": state["query"]}) launches delegated subgraph worker.
orchestration-delegation-handoff.ja: LangGraph Command(goto=research_worker) が subgraph worker 委任を起動。

orchestration-composition.name: LangGraph StateGraph
orchestration-composition.zh: builder.add_node("map", map_fn)；builder.add_conditional_edges("map", lambda s: [Send("worker", {"chunk": c}) for c in s["chunks"]]) 实现 map-reduce 组合。
orchestration-composition.en: LangGraph Send fan-out from map node implements map-reduce composition pattern.
orchestration-composition.ja: LangGraph Send fan-out が map-reduce composition を実装。

orchestration-composition.name: LangChain LCEL
orchestration-composition.zh: chain = prompt | model | parser；parallel = RunnableParallel(summary=summary_chain, keywords=keyword_chain)；chain.invoke({"topic": "LLM eval"}) 串联 PromptChain stage。
orchestration-composition.en: LangChain RunnableSequence and RunnableParallel compose summary and keyword chains as PromptChain stages.
orchestration-composition.ja: LangChain RunnableSequence/Parallel が PromptChain stage を構成。

orchestration-composition.name: Temporal
orchestration-composition.zh: Temporal ReportWorkflow.execute_activity(draft_section, spec.intro, start_to_close_timeout=timedelta(minutes=5)) 持久化多 stage 组合。
orchestration-composition.en: Temporal ReportWorkflow.execute_activity(draft_section) persists multi-stage composition across retries.
orchestration-composition.ja: Temporal workflow/activity が multi-stage composition を永続化。

orchestration-composition.name: Prefect
orchestration-composition.zh: Prefect report_flow(chunks) 使用 summarize.submit(c) 对每个 chunk 声明 ParallelBranch 数据流。
orchestration-composition.en: Prefect report_flow with summarize.submit per chunk declares ParallelBranch dataflow.
orchestration-composition.ja: Prefect flow/task submit が ParallelBranch データフローを宣言。

orchestration-composition.name: CrewAI Process
orchestration-composition.zh: Crew(agents=[researcher, writer], tasks=[research_task, writing_task], process=Process.sequential).kickoff() 按序组合 section 与 synthesis task。
orchestration-composition.en: CrewAI Process.sequential kickoff composes research and writing tasks in ordered sections.
orchestration-composition.ja: CrewAI Process.sequential kickoff が section/synthesis task を順序合成。

orchestration-evaluation.name: LangSmith
orchestration-evaluation.zh: langsmith.Client().evaluate(lambda inputs: agent.invoke(inputs), data="support-golden-v3", evaluators=[correctness]) 记录 EvaluationActivity started_at/ended_at 与 feedback_ref。
orchestration-evaluation.en: LangSmith client.evaluate on support-golden-v3 with correctness evaluator records EvaluationActivity timing and feedback_ref.
orchestration-evaluation.ja: LangSmith evaluate() が EvaluationActivity 時刻と feedback_ref を記録。

orchestration-evaluation.name: Braintrust
orchestration-evaluation.zh: Braintrust Eval("routing-agent", data=lambda: dataset, task=agent, scores=[Factuality()]) 对 pipeline 端到端评分并写入 experiment_id。
orchestration-evaluation.en: Braintrust Eval scores end-to-end pipeline into experiment_id.
orchestration-evaluation.ja: Braintrust Eval() が pipeline を experiment_id にスコアリング。

orchestration-evaluation.name: OpenAI Evals
orchestration-evaluation.zh: OpenAI Agent Evals grader 返回 pass=false 与 issues=["missing citation"] 后 agent 根据 feedback 修订并重新提交 RevisionAttempt。
orchestration-evaluation.en: OpenAI Agent Evals grader fail triggers RevisionAttempt resubmission from feedback.
orchestration-evaluation.ja: OpenAI Agent Evals grader fail が RevisionAttempt 再提出を起動。

orchestration-evaluation.name: RAGAS
orchestration-evaluation.zh: ragas.evaluate(dataset=eval_set, metrics=[Faithfulness(), AnswerRelevancy()], llm=eval_llm) 单次 EvaluationAttempt 输出 score 向量。
orchestration-evaluation.en: ragas.evaluate with Faithfulness and AnswerRelevancy outputs score vector for one EvaluationAttempt.
orchestration-evaluation.ja: RAGAS evaluate Faithfulness/AnswerRelevancy が EvaluationAttempt スコアを出力。

orchestration-evaluation.name: LangGraph evaluator loop
orchestration-evaluation.zh: LangGraph evaluator 节点在 state["score"]<0.8 时返回 revise，add_conditional_edges 将 revise 路由回 generator，驱动 EvaluatorOptimizerLoop。
orchestration-evaluation.en: LangGraph evaluator conditional_edges route revise to generator when score<0.8 as EvaluatorOptimizerLoop.
orchestration-evaluation.ja: LangGraph evaluator conditional_edges score<0.8 で generator へ EvaluatorOptimizerLoop。

orchestration-actors-delegation.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
orchestration-actors-delegation.zh: orchestrator = Agent(name="Triage", instructions="Route to specialists", handoffs=[faq_agent, billing_agent])；Runner.run(orchestrator, input) 协调 WorkerRole 专家。
orchestration-actors-delegation.en: OpenAI orchestrator Agent with handoffs coordinates WorkerRole specialists via Runner.run.
orchestration-actors-delegation.ja: OpenAI orchestrator handoffs + Runner.run が WorkerRole を協調。

orchestration-actors-delegation.name: CrewAI Agent
orchestration-actors-delegation.zh: analyst = Agent(role="Data Analyst", goal="Quantify signup funnel drop-off", backstory="10yr SaaS analyst", allow_delegation=False) 作为 WorkerRole 执行 assigned task。
orchestration-actors-delegation.en: CrewAI analyst Agent role/goal/backstory executes assigned tasks as WorkerRole without delegation.
orchestration-actors-delegation.ja: CrewAI Agent role/goal/backstory が WorkerRole として task 実行。

orchestration-actors-delegation.name: AutoGen AssistantAgent
orchestration-actors-delegation.zh: researcher = AssistantAgent(name="researcher", llm_config=gpt4, system_message="Cite sources") 在 GroupChat 中承担 SubagentRole。
orchestration-actors-delegation.en: AutoGen AssistantAgent researcher participates in GroupChat as SubagentRole with citation system_message.
orchestration-actors-delegation.ja: AutoGen AssistantAgent が GroupChat で SubagentRole を担当。

orchestration-actors-delegation.name: LangGraph supervisor
orchestration-actors-delegation.zh: supervisor_node 返回 Command(goto=random.choice(["coder","reviewer"])) 动态选择 SubagentRole worker 节点。
orchestration-actors-delegation.en: LangGraph supervisor_node Command goto coder or reviewer dynamically selects SubagentRole worker.
orchestration-actors-delegation.ja: LangGraph supervisor Command が SubagentRole worker を動的選択。

orchestration-actors-delegation.name: OpenAI HandoffOutputItem
orchestration-actors-delegation.zh: HandoffOutputItem(source_agent=triage, target_agent=faq) 写入 ControlOwnership holder=faq 于 handoff 完成时刻。
orchestration-actors-delegation.en: HandoffOutputItem triage to faq writes ControlOwnership holder=faq at handoff completion.
orchestration-actors-delegation.ja: HandoffOutputItem が ControlOwnership holder=faq を記録。

orchestration-plane.name: LangGraph
orchestration-plane.zh: LangGraph StateGraph 编译图 orchestrates orchestration-plane 多 Agent 能力面：builder.add_node 与 invoke(state) 产生可审计编排实例。
orchestration-plane.en: LangGraph StateGraph orchestrates orchestration-plane multi-agent capability via builder.add_node and invoke(state).
orchestration-plane.ja: LangGraph StateGraph が orchestration-plane multi-agent capability を orchestrate。

orchestration-plane.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
orchestration-plane.zh: OpenAI Runner.run(agent, input) 在 RunResult 中记录 handoff、tool call 与 routing 事件，构成 orchestration-plane 运行时轨迹。
orchestration-plane.en: OpenAI Runner.run records handoffs, tool calls, and routing events in RunResult as orchestration-plane runtime trace.
orchestration-plane.ja: OpenAI Runner.run が orchestration-plane runtime trace を RunResult に記録。

orchestration-plane.name: CrewAI
orchestration-plane.zh: CrewAI crew.kickoff(inputs={"spec_ref": "release-v1"}) 绑定 task 规划、委派与组合规范到一次 kickoff 执行。
orchestration-plane.en: CrewAI crew.kickoff binds task planning, delegation, and composition specs to one kickoff execution.
orchestration-plane.ja: CrewAI kickoff が planning/delegation/composition spec を一次実行に束縛。

orchestration-plane.name: A2A Protocol
orchestration-plane.zh: A2A tasks/send 创建跨 agent Task 生命周期，metadata.local_plane=orchestration-plane 标记 Moonweave 审计域。
orchestration-plane.en: A2A tasks/send creates cross-agent Task lifecycle with metadata.local_plane=orchestration-plane for Moonweave audit domain.
orchestration-plane.ja: A2A tasks/send metadata.local_plane が orchestration-plane audit domain を标记。
